theme_name: Semiconductor fab facility and cleanroom EPC capacity
source_note: Industry-first thesis: AI-driven global fab buildout (TSMC US/JP/DE, Samsung TX, Micron, Intel) outstrips qualified cleanroom/utility EPC capacity; multi-year owner-qualification barrier; US onshoring amplifier — 2404 backlog NT$193.9B record, visibility to 2029-30, US region 56% of 2026 revenue.
invalidation_criteria: 美系晶圓廠資本支出指引連續 2 季下修,或漢唐/洋基/朋億任一在手訂單連續 2 季環比下滑

theme_name: Semiconductor fab facility and cleanroom EPC capacity
source_note: Same theme as 2404; smaller and less-discovered peer — 2026 Jan-May revenue +76.1% YoY, Q1 EPS +45.3% YoY, 252d return below re-rating threshold at admission.
invalidation_criteria: 同 2404 主題共用

theme_name: Semiconductor fab facility and cleanroom EPC capacity
source_note: Water-gas-chemical utility integration for semiconductor/optoelectronics fabs; sharpest 3m-vs-prior-3m YoY inflection of the theme (-12.7% to +60.2%), least discovered (ADV ~NT$230M).
invalidation_criteria: 同 2404 主題共用

theme_name: Semiconductor fab facility and cleanroom EPC capacity
source_note: Established anchor name flagged by Fugle industry analysis alongside 2404; included for theme completeness though already re-rated (+224% 1y) — engine dd/PE penalties will position it.
invalidation_criteria: 同 2404 主題共用

theme_name: Aerospace certified fastener and precision machining supply
bottleneck_layer: NADCAP / engine-OEM certified fasteners and machined parts
source_note: Industry-first thesis: narrowbody ramp (737 MAX, A320neo) plus MRO backlog outstrips certified fastener capacity; GE/Safran/PW/RR four-OEM qualification plus NADCAP barrier; new capacity (Malaysia M2/M3) 18-24mo out; price increases already announced; order visibility to 2027; 252d return only +15% at admission (pre-re-rating).
invalidation_criteria: 波音/空巴月產能爬升計畫延後 ≥2 次,或鈦/鋁扣件報價連 2 季回落,或訂單能見度縮至 12 個月內

theme_name: Aerospace certified fastener and precision machining supply
bottleneck_layer: NADCAP / engine-OEM certified fasteners and machined parts
source_note: Theme-member: AIDC tier-2 supplier, aerospace revenue mix rose 48%→68%; momentum currently milder than 3004 — engine scoring will queue it.
invalidation_criteria: 同 3004 主題共用

theme_name: Non-China battery anode and SiC crucible carbon materials
bottleneck_layer: Battery anode (MCMB) / isotropic graphite SiC crucible
source_note: Industry-first thesis: China holds ~90% of anode supply; 1723 is the sole US-specialty-maker-qualified non-China anode supplier with 2026 ramp guided, plus 6-inch-certified isotropic-graphite SiC crucibles. Honest caveat: legacy coal-chemical base business declined 5 straight quarters — new-business scale unproven; 3m YoY inflected -31.6%→+36.9%; 252d return -5% (pre-re-rating); ADV thin (~NT$70M).
invalidation_criteria: 2026Q3 法說未確認美國負極客戶放量,或 SiC 坩堝出現同等認證競爭者

theme_name: DRAM / NAND cycle and edge AI storage
source_note: Theme-member completion (2026-07-07 curation sweep): pool already holds module makers 4973/8271/2451 — ADATA is TW largest module maker and was a coverage gap; module makers are the price-cycle leverage vehicle (inventory gains); PE 8.2 with June YoY accelerating at admission.
invalidation_criteria: DRAM/NAND 現貨價連 2 季回落,或三大原廠資本支出轉向擴產急加

theme_name: DRAM / NAND cycle and edge AI storage
source_note: Theme-member completion (2026-07-07 curation sweep): Team Group, third TW module maker; PE 6.7 at yoy_3m acceleration; same leverage-vehicle logic as 3260/4973.
invalidation_criteria: DRAM/NAND 現貨價連 2 季回落,或三大原廠資本支出轉向擴產急加
